texto: French Revolution- all them fellas the figgered her out got their heads chopped off. Always that way, jus as natural as rain. You didn't do it for fun no way. Doin' it cause you have to. Cause it's you. Look a Washington; Fit the Revolution an' after, them sons-a-bitches turned on him. An' Lincoln the same. Same folks yellin' to kill 'em. Natural as rain.
explicacao: Orientação direta de John T. Steinback sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “French Revolution- all them fellas the figgered her out got their heads chopped off. Always that …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, historical-fiction, revolution, útil em momentos de dia-chuvoso e reflexao.
